# PR Status & Code Review — 2026-03-12

**Created:** 2026-03-12  
**Purpose:** Standalone tracking document for PRs #171–#176 opened against `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`.  
**Scope:** PR links, current status, file-level review, and merge-readiness verdict for each PR.  
**Note:** This doc is intentionally separate from `qa-report-2026-03-12.md` to avoid merge conflicts with the child PRs.

> **Status key:** 🔴 Open (not reviewed) · 🟡 Open (reviewed — pending CI) · ✅ Approved · 🚧 Draft / WIP · 🔁 Changes requested

## PR #171 — Fix hit log #N slot + raw team ID for orphaned saves

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-bug-a-j` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug A (hit log shows `#N` slot) · Bug J (orphaned save shows raw team ID)  
**Changed files:** 5 · **+125 / −123** (mostly test cleanup)

### CI

| Check                       | Result                                     |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| lint                        | ✅ Pass                                    |
| build                       | ✅ Pass                                    |
| E2E chromium shards 1–3     | ✅ Pass (shard 3 confirmed; 1–2 completed) |
| E2E webkit shards 1–3       | ✅ Pass                                    |
| Update snapshots (chromium) | ✅ Pass                                    |

### File-by-file review

**`src/features/gameplay/context/index.tsx`** (+2 lines)  
Added `batterName?: string` to `PlayLogEntry` — optional, backward-compatible.  
JSDoc explains the `#N` fallback clearly. ✅ No concerns.

**`src/features/gameplay/context/hitBall.ts`** (+16 lines)  
`processConfirmedHit` now resolves batter display name at hit time:

1. `playerOverrides[team][playerId]?.nickname?.trim()` (custom team nickname)
2. `generateRoster(base.teams[battingTeam]).batters.find(p => p.id === playerId)?.name` (stock team)
3. `undefined` → falls back to `#N` in UI

Both paths guard `playerId` being absent. Spread `...(batterName ? { batterName } : {})` keeps entries compact.  
_Non-blocking observation:_ `generateRoster` generates all 9 batters to look up one name on each stock-team hit. It's I/O-free and fast; acceptable for now. ✅ No blocking concerns.

**`src/features/gameplay/components/HitLog/index.tsx`** (+3 / −10 lines)  
Removes `useCustomTeams` async hook and `resolveTeamLabel` entirely. Team name now comes from `teamLabels[entry.team]` — pre-resolved at game-start, so deleted-team saves always show the original name. Renders `entry.batterName ?? \`#${entry.batterNum}\`` cleanly. ✅ Correct.

**`src/features/gameplay/components/HitLog/hitLog.test.tsx`** (net rewrite — simpler)  
Removes 50-line `vi.mock("@shared/hooks/useCustomTeams", ...)` block (no longer needed).  
Replaces hand-rolled `makeCtx` with `makeContextValue` from `@test/testHelpers` — matches codebase convention.  
Adds three focused tests:

- `batterName` renders when present; `#N` absent
- `#N` fallback when `batterName` missing
- `teamLabels` used for orphaned-team saves (raw ID never appears)

✅ All three tests verify the acceptance criteria.

### Acceptance criteria

| Criterion                                                              | Met? |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---- |
| Hit log entries show batter name (e.g. `▲3 — Roberto Martinez`)        | ✅   |
| Backward compat: older saves without `batterName` fall back to `#N`    | ✅   |
| Loading a save for a deleted team shows original team name, not raw ID | ✅   |

### Verdict

✅ **Ready to merge.** Implementation is correct, surgical, and well-tested. No blocking issues.

## PR #172 — Fix Resume button after FINAL + suppress updateProgress error

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-game-over-resume-issue` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug C (Resume button persists after FINAL) · Bug 3 (redundant `updateProgress` console error)  
**Changed files:** 8 · **+176 / −59**

### Changed files

| File                                                       | Change summary                                                                                                                                  |
| ---------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/storage/types.ts`                                     | Added `onGameOver: () => void` to `AppShellOutletContext`                                                                                       |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/AppShell/index.tsx`      | Added `handleGameOver: () => setHasActiveSession(false)`, exposed on outlet context                                                             |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/Game/GameInner.tsx`      | Accepts `onGameOver?: () => void` prop; fires via `useEffect` with `gameOverFiredRef` guard (fires once per game, resets on `gameOver → false`) |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/Game/index.tsx`          | Threads `onGameOver` prop through to `GameInner`                                                                                                |
| `src/features/gameplay/pages/GamePage/index.tsx`           | Destructures `onGameOver` from outlet context, passes to `<Game>`                                                                               |
| `src/features/saves/hooks/useRxdbGameSync.ts`              | New optional `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoad = false` param; stored in always-current ref; skips `updateProgress` when flag is set                       |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/Game/GameInner.test.tsx` | +2 tests: fires once on `false→true` transition; fires exactly once on repeated `true` renders                                                  |
| `src/features/saves/hooks/useRxdbGameSync.test.tsx`        | Tests for new `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoad` param path                                                                                                |

### Review notes

- `gameOverFiredRef` ref pattern correctly prevents double-firing and resets for the next game. ✅
- `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoadRef.current` is updated on every render to handle mid-session save swaps (FINAL → in-progress). ✅
- `onGameOver` is optional (`?`) — existing callers without this context (e.g., tests) are unaffected. ✅
- `saveStore.ts` is intentionally **not** changed here (moved to PR #173 to avoid file-ownership conflicts). ✅

### Acceptance criteria

| Criterion                                                                | Met? |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---- |
| After game reaches FINAL naturally, home screen Resume button disappears | ✅   |
| After loading a FINAL save and navigating home, no Resume button         | ✅   |
| For an in-progress game, Resume button still appears                     | ✅   |
| No console error when game ends naturally                                | ✅   |
| No console error when loading a FINAL save                               | ✅   |

### Verdict

✅ **Ready to merge.** Clean implementation with correct ref-guard pattern and good test coverage.

---

## PR #173 — Fix "undefined" leaking in save/team import errors

**Branch:** `copilot/fix-bug-f-and-bug-5` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug F (save import leaks "undefined") · Bug 5 (team import leaks "undefined") · `updateProgress` silent-resolve guard  
**Changed files:** 4 · **+115 / −63**

### Changed files

| File                                                              | Change summary                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/features/saves/storage/saveStore.ts`                         | (1) `importRxdbSave`: added `typeof version !== "number"` guard before version comparison — emits clean user-facing message with no raw tokens; (2) `updateProgress`: changed `throw` to silent `return` when doc not found |
| `src/features/saves/storage/saveStore.test.ts`                    | Updated stale test (`updateProgress` unknown-ID now asserts `.resolves`); added test: `{}` import → error contains "Invalid"/"format", does NOT contain "undefined"/"null"/"NaN"                                            |
| `src/features/customTeams/storage/customTeamExportImport.ts`      | Added `typeof obj["formatVersion"] !== "number"` guard before discriminator checks — handles empty/structurally invalid objects first                                                                                       |
| `src/features/customTeams/storage/customTeamExportImport.test.ts` | Added test: `{}` import → error contains "Invalid"/"format", does NOT contain "undefined"/"null"/"NaN"                                                                                                                      |

### Review notes

- Guard order is correct: `formatVersion` type-check fires before `type`/`formatVersion` value comparisons, so malformed objects never reach the discriminator path. ✅
- Well-formed-but-wrong bundles (wrong `type`, unsupported `formatVersion`) still produce their specific errors unchanged. ✅
- `updateProgress` silent-resolve is the right behavior: save deleted between game-start and game-over is an expected race, not an error. ✅
- Error messages are user-friendly, contain no raw JS values, and guide the user to the export flow. ✅

### Acceptance criteria

| Criterion                                                                          | Met?                                  |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Pasting `{}` into save import shows clean message with no "undefined"/"null"/"NaN" | ✅                                    |
| Pasting `{}` into team import shows clean message with no "undefined"/"null"/"NaN" | ✅                                    |
| Valid imports still succeed                                                        | ✅ (existing passing tests unchanged) |
| `updateProgress` for a deleted save silently resolves                              | ✅                                    |

### Verdict

✅ **Ready to merge.** Minimal, well-targeted guards with clear user-facing messages and matching tests.

## PR #174 — Fix save delete confirmation + back button navigation

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-bug-b-and-bug-g` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug B (save delete has no confirmation) · Bug G (back button on player career page goes to wrong route)  
**State:** 🚧 **Draft / WIP** — checklist not fully ticked

### Changed files

| File                                                                        | Change summary                                                                                                                               |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/features/saves/components/SaveSlotList/index.tsx`                      | Delete button now calls `window.confirm("Delete this save? This cannot be undone.")` before `onDelete`                                       |
| `src/features/careerStats/pages/PlayerCareerPage/index.tsx`                 | Back button now navigates to `/stats?team=${encodeURIComponent(teamParam)}` when `teamParam` present, else `/stats` — uses `useSearchParams` |
| `src/features/saves/components/SaveSlotList/SaveSlotList.test.tsx`          | Added `window.confirm` spy tests                                                                                                             |
| `src/features/saves/components/SavesModal/SavesModal.test.tsx`              | Updated for confirm stub                                                                                                                     |
| `src/features/saves/pages/SavesPage/SavesPage.test.tsx`                     | Added `vi.stubGlobal("confirm", ...)` for jsdom                                                                                              |
| `src/features/careerStats/pages/PlayerCareerPage/PlayerCareerPage.test.tsx` | Added back-button tests with/without `teamParam`                                                                                             |

### Review notes (draft — not yet fully reviewed)

The core logic changes are small and correct:

- `window.confirm` guard in `SaveSlotList` matches the team-deletion pattern already used elsewhere. ✅
- `navigate(teamParam ? \`/stats?team=...\` : "/stats")`replaces`navigate(-1)` correctly. ✅
- `encodeURIComponent(teamParam)` is appropriate for the URL value. ✅
- jsdom `window.confirm` stub is correctly added to the test files that need it. ✅

**Needs before marking ready:** PR is still in Draft state with open checklist items — author should mark ready-for-review when checklist is complete.

### Verdict

🚧 **Awaiting author** — logic looks correct based on visible diffs; mark out of Draft when checklist complete.

## PR #175 — Fix four copy bugs in HelpContent

**Branch:** `copilot/fix-copilot-quirks-and-issues` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug D (Instant speed missing) · Bug E (Starter Pitcher not documented) · Bug H (wrong 🔔 emoji) · Bug I (stats described as editable)  
**State:** 🚧 **Draft / WIP** — checklist not fully ticked  
**Changed file:** `src/features/help/components/HelpContent/index.tsx` only

### Changes made

| Bug   | Change                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ----- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Bug E | Added `<Li>` bullet: "When managing a team, a **Starting Pitcher** dropdown appears during pre-game setup — choose which eligible pitcher starts the game before clicking Play Ball."                     |
| Bug I | Changed "Edit names, stats, and positions to customize it." → "Edit player names and positions to customize it. **Note:** player stat values are determined at creation and cannot be changed afterward." |
| Bug D | Changed "Choose Slow / Normal / Fast speed" → "Choose **Slow / Normal / Fast / Instant** speed to control the pace. Instant resolves the entire game in one step with no delay."                          |
| Bug H | Changed `🔔 slider = chime & fanfare volume` → `🎵 slider = background music volume`                                                                                                                      |

### Review notes

- All four copy fixes are exactly as specified in the bug reports. ✅
- Changes are in `HelpContent/index.tsx` only — zero risk of runtime regression. ✅
- No test assertions reference the exact changed text, so no test updates required. ✅

**Needs before marking ready:** PR is still in Draft — mark out of Draft when done.

### Verdict

🚧 **Awaiting author** — all four copy fixes appear complete and correct. Mark out of Draft to proceed.

## PR #176 — Add hardcoded demo teams for new users

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotadd-demo-teams` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Feature:** New-1 — two starter teams seeded on first launch so brand-new users can play immediately  
**State:** 🚧 **Draft / WIP** — checklist not fully ticked  
**Changed files:** 3 new/modified

### Changed files

| File                                                       | Change summary                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ---------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/features/customTeams/generation/demoTeams.ts` _(new)_ | `DEMO_TEAMS: DemoTeamDef[]` — two fully-populated teams: "Riverside Rockets" (RIV) and "Lakewood Legends" (LAK). Each has 9 lineup + 4 bench + 4 pitchers. Hitter stats sum to 150 (HITTER_STAT_CAP); pitcher stats sum to 160 (PITCHER_STAT_CAP). |
| `src/shared/hooks/useSeedDemoTeams.ts` _(new)_             | Hook: on mount, if `customTeams` collection is empty, calls `CustomTeamStore.createCustomTeam(...)` for each demo team definition. Uses a ref guard to run at most once. Errors are caught and warned (not thrown).                                |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/RootLayout/index.tsx`    | Calls `useSeedDemoTeams()` on mount — runs once on every app start                                                                                                                                                                                 |

### Review notes

- Demo team stats comply with constraints: hitter contact/power/speed each in `[40, 70]`, sum = 150; pitcher velocity/control/movement each in `[40, 70]`, sum = 160. ✅
- No player IDs hardcoded — all generated by `createCustomTeam`. ✅
- `seedIfEmpty().catch(...)` pattern prevents unhandled promise rejections. ✅
- `RootLayout` chosen over `AppShell` intentionally to avoid conflict with PR #172 (which modifies `AppShell`). ✅
- Hook is a no-op when teams exist — safe for existing users. ✅

**Needs before marking ready:** PR is still in Draft — validate `yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test` all pass, then mark out of Draft.

### Verdict

🚧 **Awaiting author** — implementation looks correct and spec-compliant. Mark out of Draft to proceed.

| ----- | ---- | ------------------------------------------- |
| 1     | #171 | None                                        |
| 2     | #172 | None                                        |
| 3     | #173 | None                                        |
